sponsorship_note: No explicit sponsorship language. EEO statement is inclusive. No ITAR/citizenship requirement. Proceed.
jd_summary: Culture & Employee Experience Specialist supporting programs that strengthen workplace culture, foster engagement, and align organizational requirements. Role is both administrative and operational: coordinate day-to-day activities, manage logistics, maintain records/metrics, first point of contact for culture/engagement resources. Key responsibilities: execute Culture & EX strategies, partner with Director of Culture & EX, manage department communications, collaborate with HR/Communications/business teams, analyze internal data for trends and impact, support L&D and engagement initiatives, maintain program governance and documentation, coordinate meetings/events/training sessions. Required: Bachelor's in HR/OD, 2-5yr HR/culture/engagement/program coordination, strong project management and communication skills, data analytics. Desired: MS Office, LMS experience, data analytics tools, Qualtrics/Workday/similar, Smartsheet.
fit_notes: Strong P3 EX/OD fit. 2-5yr YOE perfectly matches Jamie's ~3yr. JD emphasis on program coordination, stakeholder collaboration, data analysis, and engagement all map directly to Jamie's canonical experience. Culture/EX is Jamie's core lane.
